checkin.journal:
Nice family day, spent with my sis sandi and my nephews, dad and videk and cosita
Woke up in Lj apartment was super nice 
Packing
Breakfast at vesna’s - super good
Walkie in forest 🌳 
Dad arrived - he was sad as my uncle Lojze died - sucks but wont be able to go to his funeral
We had amazing lunch
Videk played violin 🎻 
Dad drove me in new X - only 2 weeks then he is getting 3 back
We flew from zg to Mla
Watched Flamming Hot movie was super good
Was a great day, seing my dad is always special an
